specs.section_path: 15-Layer Summary Table > Case Study: The Layer 3 (Genomic-Morphogenetic) Transduction Pathway > Case Study: The Layer 5 (Organismal Self) Action-Perception Cycle > Meta-Framework Integrations > Predictive Coding Integration > Model Consolidation (Sleep):
source_formulae: P0R02199: Sleep is the offline model optimisation phase. NREM sleep updates the static weights of the generative model (consolidating memories), while REM sleep refines the model's dynamic properties by exploring the consequences of different priors in a simulated environment, effectively "annealing" the system to find better free-energy minima.

specs.section_path: 15-Layer Summary Table > Case Study: The Layer 3 (Genomic-Morphogenetic) Transduction Pathway > Case Study: The Layer 5 (Organismal Self) Action-Perception Cycle > Meta-Framework Integrations > Predictive Coding Integration > Model Consolidation (Sleep):
source_formulae: P0R02201: The Four-Stroke Engine, while computationally complete, requires an overarching intentional context. The Psis field provides this context by coupling to the engine's most globally coherent states, thereby biasing the entire cycle towards a desired goal. The interaction Hamiltonian is H_int = -lambda * Psis * sigma.

specs.section_path: 15-Layer Summary Table > Case Study: The Layer 3 (Genomic-Morphogenetic) Transduction Pathway > Case Study: The Layer 5 (Organismal Self) Action-Perception Cycle > Meta-Framework Integrations > Predictive Coding Integration > Model Consolidation (Sleep):
source_formulae: P0R02203: The most potent candidate for sigma in Layer 5 is not a static property but a dynamic one: the global coherence and precision of the entire action-perception cycle. This can be physically measured in several ways:

P0R02204: During wakefulness, sigma could be the precision-weighting of the prediction error signal itself, represented by high-frequency (gamma) oscillations. A highly coherent gamma signal signifies a high-confidence, high-focus state.
P0R02205: During NREM sleep, sigma is the highly structured, global coherence of cortico-thalamic slow-wave oscillations. This is a state of maximum internal stability and information integration.
test_protocols: preserve The Collective State Variable (sigma): source-accounting boundary
